children.name: should return the input unchanged when the implementation version is not found
should return the input unchanged when the implementation version and request version are the same i.e. v0
should return the input unchanged when the implementation version and request version are the same i.e. v1
should convert input from v0 to v1 when the request version is v0 and the implementation version is v1
should convert input from v1 to v0 format when the request version is v1 and the implementation version is v0
should convert input from v2 to v0 format when the request version is v2 and the implementation version is v0
should fail trying to convert input from v2 to v0 format when the request version is v2 and the implementation version is v0
should convert input from v2 to v1 format when the request version is v2 and the implementation version is v1
should fail trying to convert input from v2 to v1 format when the request version is v2 and the implementation version is v1
should return an empty array when the input is an empty array
should convert input from v1 to v2 format when the request version is v1 and the implementation version is v2
should fail trying to convert input from v1 to v2 format when the request version is v1 and the implementation version is v2
controller utility tests -- handleTimestampInEvents for retl connections
when events(all track), timestamp should be taken from properties.timestamp
when events(all track) without properties.timestamp, timestamp should be taken from timestamp
when events(all identify) without context.timestamp, timestamp should be taken from timestamp
when proc events(identify, track, group) are mixed, timestamp should be taken from relevant places for identify & track, skipped for group
when a mix of VDM enabled & non-VDM destinations are available, the timestamp will be applied to only non-VDM destination
Api tests with a mock source/destination
(mock destination) Processor transformation scenario with single event
(webhook) failure scenario with single event config not containing webhook endpoint
(pinterest) failure scneario for multiplex but event fails at validation
(webhook) success snceario for batch of input
(webhook) success snceario for batch of input of 2 events and expect 3 output events
(pinterest) partial success scenario for multiplex with 2 events and expect 3 output events with 3rd one failing
(webhook) send events for 2 destinations router transform
(webhook) successful source transform for source present in v1 and server providing v0 endpoint
(pipedream) success source transform for source present in v0 and server providing v1 endpoint
getAirshipTimestamp - should return the same timestamp
getAirshipTimestamp - should return with correct format when T is present but Z is not present
getAirshipTimestamp - should return with correct format when T & Z is not present
getAirshipTimestamp - should throw error when timestamp is not supported
getAirshipTimestamp - should return with correct format when timestamp contains microseconds without Z
should return the correct attribute payload when jsonAttributes is not present in integrations object
should throw error when jsonAttributes is present in integrations object and jsonAttribute(widgets_installed#123) is array
should return the correct attribute payload when jsonAttributes is present in integrations object and jsonAttribute(widgets_installed#123) is object
should return the correct attribute payload when jsonAttributes is present in integrations object and jsonAttribute(data) is object & traits include an object
should return the correct attribute payload when jsonAttributes is present in integrations object and jsonAttribute(widgets_installed#123) is object & traits include an object
should return true when timestamp is a valid Unix timestamp
should return true when timestamp is a valid Unix timestamp with milliseconds
should return true when timestamp is a valid date string
should return false when timestamp is not a valid Unix timestamp or date string(invalid_timestamp)
should return false when timestamp is not a valid Unix timestamp or date string(uuid)
should return false when timestamp is not a valid Unix timestamp or date string(91504)
should return false when timestamp is not a valid Unix timestamp or date string("91504")
